Stretching her wings wide on a cliff edge, catching thermal updrafts from volcanic vents below
Breathing a controlled stream of flame to light a brazier in her stone lair
Sorting through her treasure hoard, weighing a gold chalice in her clawed hand thoughtfully
Landing on a mountain peak, wings folding gracefully, taloned feet gripping jagged rock
Sharpening her claws against volcanic basalt with casual, practiced efficiency
Diving from a cliff into a volcanic hot spring, wings tucked tight against her body
Inspecting her own scales in a pool's reflection, picking off loose ones carefully
Roaring into a canyon, the sound echoing for miles across the volcanic range
Curling her tail protectively around a clutch of eggs in her heated nest
Crouching at a cliff edge, watching prey in the valley far below intently
Forging a blade in her own breath-fire, holding raw metal bare-handed without flinching
Emerging from a lava pool, molten rock sliding off her fireproof scales like water
Polishing a ruby gemstone against her scaled forearm until it gleams brilliantly
Banking sharply around a volcanic spire, wing-tips nearly brushing the smoking stone
Scraping ash from her horns with her claws, maintaining her crown-like protrusions
Heating ore in her palm with concentrated flame until it glows white-hot
Perching on a narrow ledge, preening her wing-membranes with meticulous attention
Smashing through a rockfall with her tail, clearing a path to her den
Scooping molten lava into a stone mold with her bare hands
Leaping between cliff faces, wings half-spread for balance during the aerial vault
Examining a crack in the mountain wall, breathing flame into it to widen the fissure
Dragging a freshly-hunted elk carcass up a steep mountainside by her jaws
Testing a thermal vent's temperature by extending her wing-membrane over the steam
Crushing coal into diamonds between her powerful clawed hands
Shaking volcanic dust from her wings in explosive bursts, scales glittering beneath
